pattern: Sorting the special floors turns the answer into the largest gap between consecutive markers, including the open stretches before the first and after the last.
hints: The special floors split the rented range into clear blocks of ordinary floors. You just need the biggest block.
After sorting the special floors, the free floors between two adjacent specials number to one less than their difference.
Sort special, then take the max of (special[0]-bottom), (top-special[-1]), and (special[i]-special[i-1]-1) for every adjacent pair.

edge_inputs.description: gaps before, between, and after the specials
every floor is special, answer is zero
one special at the bottom edge
one special at the top edge
one special in the middle, two big blocks
unsorted special input must be sorted first
adjacent specials leave no gap between them

stress.description: wide range with many unique special floors to stress gap finding
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    bottom = 1
    top = 10**9
    k = max(1, min(size, top - bottom + 1))
    special = rng.sample(range(bottom, top + 1), k)
    return [bottom, top, special]
stress.note: unique sampled specials within [bottom, top] as the constraints require
